result.output:
Explanation: The search results reveal a paper published in Redox Biology, the official journal of the Society for Redox Biology and Medicine, that matches all the clues: it investigates erastin (an anti-cancer, bacteria-killing drug) as a model, studies system xc− inhibition, uses the MRC-5 cell line (confirmed mycoplasma-negative), and explores the link between fibroblast glutathione metabolism and pulmonary fibrosis. The title is explicitly provided in the search result.
Exact Answer: Erastin, a ferroptosis-inducing agent, suppresses pulmonary fibrosis by targeting fibroblast glutathione metabolism in vitro and in vivo
Confidence: 100%
